topic.description: This topic encompasses legislation related to telecommunications infrastructure, public safety communications, and the prevention of mobile device theft.

Document 1: Amends the Digital Television Transition and Public Safety Act of 2005 to extend the requirement for payments from the Digital Television Transition and Public Safety Fund for public safety agencies.
assistance in the acquisition of interoperable communications equipment for radio communication.
Document 2: Cell Phone Theft Prevention Act of 2016
prohibits service providers from providing service on smart phones reported as stolen.
Document 3: Spectrum Relocation Fund Act of 2015
makes amounts available from the Spectrum Relocation Fund for research and development activities to improve the efficiency of electromagnetic spectrum use.

topic.name: Tax Assistance Programs
topic.description: Legislation aimed at improving and expanding volunteer income tax assistance and taxpayer rights for low-income individuals and small businesses.

Document 1: establish a Community Volunteer Income Tax Assistance Matching Grant Program
assist low-income taxpayers and members of underserved populations
Document 2: authorize the Secretary to make grants to develop, expand, or continue volunteer income tax assistance programs
increases the grant funding for low-income taxpayer clinics
Document 3: treat professional employer organizations (PEOs) as employers for employment tax purposes
allowing such PEOs to pay wages and collect and remit payroll taxes on behalf of an employer

topic.name: Small Business Development and Support
topic.description: Legislation aimed at enhancing support and resources for small businesses, particularly in areas of high unemployment and energy efficiency.

Document 1: Amends the Small Business Investment Act of 1958 to expand the new markets venture capital program to areas of high unemployment.
Allows the operational assistance that companies provide to small businesses in such high-unemployment areas to include retooling, updating, or replacing of machinery or equipment.
Document 2: This bill amends the Small Business Act with respect to the plan developed by the Administrator of the Small Business Administration (SBA) to improve the quality of data reported on bundled and consolidated contracts.
the Administrator may not exercise the authority to award limited SBA guaranteed loans for any fiscal year as part of certain SBA-administered pilot programs.
Document 3: Amends the Small Business Investment Act of 1958 to authorize financial assistance through the Small Business Administration (SBA) to state and local development companies for projects that reduce energy consumption.
Directs the SBA Administrator to make small business loans to purchase energy efficient equipment or fixtures, or to reduce the borrower's energy consumption.

topic.name: Mine Safety and Environmental Regulations
topic.description: Legislation aimed at improving safety standards and environmental protections in mining and pipeline operations.

Document 1: Robert C. Byrd Mine Safety Protection Act of 2013
requires the Secretary of Labor to conduct health and safety related accident investigations in coal or other mines.
Document 2: Clean Rivers Act of 2011
directs the Administrator of the Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration to review the adequacy of PHMSA regulations.

topic.name: Unemployment Benefits Legislation
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislation related to the extension and modification of unemployment benefits and assistance programs in response to economic conditions.

Document 1: Emergency Unemployment Compensation Extension Act of 2014
extends emergency unemployment compensation payments for eligible individuals
Document 2: Unemployment Insurance Extension Act of 2010
extends federal-state agreements increasing regular unemployment compensation payments
Document 3: Extension of Trade Adjustment Assistance
amends the Trade and Globalization Adjustment Assistance Act of 2009 to extend trade adjustment assistance programs

topic.name: School Health and Nutrition Policies
topic.description: Legislative acts aimed at improving health and nutrition standards in schools through enhanced programs and education.

Document 1: Student-to-School Nurse Ratio Improvement Act of 2009
reduce such ratio
Document 2: Healthy Children Through School Nutrition Education Act

require local educational agencies participating in the school lunch or breakfast programs to include in their school wellness policies the requirement that each student receive 50 hours of nutrition education each school year.
Document 3: Student Breakfast and Education Improvement Act of 2007
require the Secretary of Education to award competitive grants to states or local educational agencies for the establishment or enhancement of school breakfast programs

topic.name: Public Safety Legislation
topic.description: Legislation aimed at improving public safety through regulation and prevention measures.

Document 1: State Ethics Law Protection Act of 2013
limits the amount of money an individual or entity doing business with a state or local agency may contribute to a political party, campaign, or elected official.
Document 2: Runaway Reporting Improvement Act of 2011
requires federal, state, and local law enforcement agencies to certify compliance with requirements to report missing children.
Document 3: Mynisha's Law
establish criteria for reviewing applications for designation as a High Intensity Gang Activity Area.

topic.name: Energy Export Regulation
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislative measures and amendments related to the regulation and management of energy exports, particularly focusing on oil and natural gas.

Document 1: Amends the Natural Gas Act regarding natural gas exports
Repeal limitations on oil exports
Document 2: Amends the Outer Continental Shelf Lands Act to prohibit oil and gas preleasing, leasing, and related activities
Document 3: Transfer from the Secretary of the Treasury to the state of Colorado derived from oil and gas development leases

topic.name: Marine and Coastal Resource Management
topic.description: Legislation focused on the restoration, protection, and management of marine and coastal ecosystems and resources.

Document 1: Establishes in the Treasury the National Endowment for the Oceans which shall fund grants for programs to restore, protect, maintain, or understand living marine resources and their habitats
Directs the Secretary to make grants to coastal states or affected Indian tribes, and regional planning bodies to create and implement regional strategic plans.
Document 2: Amends the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act to require the Secretary of Agriculture to conduct forest management activities in the Lake Tahoe Basin
Requires the Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit to manage vehicular parking and traffic in the Unit.
Document 3: Reestablish the Program Office of the Gulf of Mexico Program as an office of the Environmental Protection Agency
Authorize the EPA Administrator to provide grants for use in monitoring the water quality and living resources of the Gulf ecosystem.

topic.name: Tax Legislation and Policy
topic.description: This cluster discusses various legislative acts related to tax policy and its implications for specific sectors such as education and housing.

Document 1: Amends the Richard B. Russell National School Lunch Act to require schools participating in the school lunch program to donate any excess food
to tax-exempt food banks or charitable organizations in their localities.
Document 2: Amends the Internal Revenue Code to terminate the taxpayer election to designate $3 of income tax liability for financing of presidential election campaigns
Document 3: Amends the Internal Revenue Code to reinstate the first-time homebuyer tax credit for one year beginning on the enactment date of this Act.
